spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
spring-boot-mongo/src/test/java/de/codec.human_impl: Replaced 'import org.junit.Test' with 'import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test' and removed '@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)' and related imports.

springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner and annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support modern testing standards.
Switch from JUnit 4 static import to JUnit 5/hamcrest MatcherAssert for assertion compatibility.
springdata-jpa/src/test/java/jpa/repo/Jp.human_impl: import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat; -> import static org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat;

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/dom.general_idea: Standardize the relationship type string to uppercase to align with Neo4j conventions.
Remove the @Index annotation as indexing is now typically handled via schema definitions or repository methods in the new driver.
Use diamond operator for generic type instantiation to clean up code.
Consolidate getter and setter methods into single-line definitions for brevity.

springdata-neo4j/src/main/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Rewrote Cypher query from legacy START/MATCH syntax to modern pattern matching syntax.

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and assertions with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with modern testing standards.
Update assertion calls to use the message-as-last-argument style preferred by JUnit 5.
Remove obsolete comments, debug output, and unused imports to clean up the test class.
springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.human_impl: Removed out() method, debug comments, and unused HashMap import

springdata-neo4j/src/test/java/neo4j/rep.general_idea: Remove imports for deprecated OGM classes and add imports for the new Bolt driver classes.

springdata-redis/src/test/java/redis/Use.general_idea: Reorder assertEquals arguments to match JUnit 5 convention (expected, actual, message).
Correct the error message string for the full name assertion to reflect the actual field being tested.
Remove trailing whitespace and normalize indentation to standard style.

pom.xml.general_idea: Include the new dedicated MongoDB driver module in the multi-module build structure.

spring-boot-mongo/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the project parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom parent POM to centralize dependency management.
Renamed the Maven artifact ID from mongoboot to spring-boot-mongo to align with the directory name.
Updated the project name and description for clarity.
Removed the explicit java.version property, likely relying on the parent POM or default compiler settings for Java 21 compatibility.
Added a property to manage the version of the docker-maven-plugin.
Added the Spring Boot Actuator starter dependency to enable production-ready features.
Added a Maven profile to configure the docker-maven-plugin for building Docker images.
